stories.title: Build eval generator script
acceptanceCriteria: Script at scripts/generate_evals.py reads each SKILL.md frontmatter (name, description) and generates trigger-evals.json + evals.json
trigger-evals.json has >=8 should_trigger=true + >=5 should_trigger=false per skill
evals.json has >=3 cases with query, files, expected_behavior fields
Queries are realistic and varied (not skill-name-mentioning theater)
At least 3 of the 5 negatives are near-miss (topic-adjacent)
Script skips skills that already have evals/ directory with both files
Script runs without errors on the full repo

stories.title: Generate evals for all 64 skills missing them
acceptanceCriteria: All 64 skills without evals now have evals/trigger-evals.json and evals/evals.json
Every trigger-evals.json has >=8 positive + >=5 negative cases
All JSON files are valid (parseable with json.loads)
run_eval.py --offline passes for at least 3 sampled skills from different plugins

stories.title: Validate and run offline smoke on all plugins
acceptanceCriteria: python3 plugin-dev/scripts/validate_plugin.py --plugin-dir <dir> passes for all 52 plugins
python3 plugin-dev/scripts/run_eval.py --offline passes on 5+ sampled skills across different plugins
No JSON parse errors in any eval file
Commit with clear message and push to main
